metadata_mapping.scene_title: Scene header text when present, else page <title>
metadata_mapping.date: Not publicly exposed on tested public pages
metadata_mapping.description: Synthesized from source slug and cleaned page title when no useful site description is exposed
metadata_mapping.cover_image: Embedded player iframe query parameter `i`, or tile thumbnail fallback
metadata_mapping.performers: Primary profile link at /<username>-<id>/ plus URL slug fallback
metadata_mapping.tags: Group links at /g/<slug> when present; source slug fallback

date: No stable public selector found on tested scene pages
description: derived from source slug and page <title>

search_strategy.notes: /search/ route visible in nav but search scraping not tested.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: Social-post format not suitable for fragment matching.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: Custom platform; route structure confirmed from homepage HTML.
Social/login-gated content may limit anonymous access.
Begin with publicly accessible /videos/ and /explore/ routes.
Treat as a community site — respect rate limits and session handling.
known_limitations: Not a standard KVS or WordPress install — custom parsing is required throughout.
Public scene pages tested in May 2026 do not expose a reliable publish date.
Some content may require login or may intermittently trigger Cloudflare/rate limiting.
Performer profile images appear to be gallery thumbnails rather than dedicated avatar media.
